items.caption: A moment at a scientific event where the prime minister of india, who is also the president of the council of scientific and industrial research, is presenting a young scientist award to a recipient. the prime minister is dressed in a traditional indian kurta and turban, and he is holding a plaque with the award's details. the recipient is holding a similar plaque, indicating the formal nature of the ceremony. the background features a blue banner with the text "council of scientific and industrial research" and "national science day," suggesting the event is related to national science day celebrations. the setting appears to be indoors, possibly within a conference hall or a similar venue.
